–1. A name given to JacobGe 32:24-32;2Ki 17:34;Ho 
12:3,4
–2. A name of the Messiah in prophecyIsa 49:3
–3. A name given to the descendants of Jacob, a nation
  .Also called ISRAELITES, and HEBREWSGe 43:32;Ex 1:15;9:7;10:3;21:2;Le 23:42;Jos 13:6
  .Etc1Sa 4:6;13:3,19;14:11,21;Php 3:5
–(TRIBES OF ISRAEL were named after the sons of Jacob)
–(Usually, in lists, the names of Levi and Joseph, two sons of 
Jacob, do not appear)
  .The descendants of Levi were consecrated to the rites of religion, 
and the two sons of Joseph, Ephraim and Manasseh, were adopted by Jacob in Joseph’s 
placeGe 48:5;Jos 14:4
  .And their names appear in the catalogues of tribes instead of 
those of Levi and Joseph, as follows, ASHER, BENJAMIN, DAN, EPHRAIM, GAD, ISSACHAR, 
JUDAH, MANASSEH, NAPHTALI, REUBEN, SIMEON, ZEBULUN
  .Names of, seen in John’s vision, on the gates of the New JerusalemRe 21:12
  .Prophecies concerningGe 15:5,13;25:23;26:4;27:28,29,40;48:19;49;De 33
  .Prophecies about the multitude ofGe 13:1
